title: chore(deps): bump systeminformation from 5.30.3 to 5.31.1 in /observability/_examples/otel-bridge/agent-hub

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: Update systeminformation
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: previous version bump for same dependency

summary: Dependabot security update bumping systeminformation from 5.30.3 to 5.31.1 in the otel-bridge agent-hub example. The update includes fixes for Command Injection vulnerabilities (CWE-78) in versions() and wifiNetworks() on Linux. Only the pnpm-lock.yaml file in the example directory is changed (adding libc fields to rollup package resolutions).
maintainerNotes: This is a security fix PR that has been approved by abhiaiyer91 and all CI checks are passing. The change is confined to an examples lockfile so risk is minimal. A previous systeminformation bump (#11947) was merged in January. This PR has been sitting approved and green for 19 days—safe to merge immediately.
